---
title: "Partial derivatives"
chapter: "18.02 - Multivariable calculus"
author: "TgX.2"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Mục lục bài viết"
    toc-location: right
    css: ../styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: | 
        <script src="../navigation.js" defer></script>
---

___
# Level curves


___
# Partial derivatives


___
# Tangent plane approximation


___
# Max-Min problmes


___
# Least squares


___
# Differentials

___
# Chain rule


___
# Gradient

___
# Directional derivative


___
# Tangent plane


___
# Lagrange multipliers


___
# Non-independent variables
